$description: Per-screen handoff spec for "New Booking" (S1) in flow "pes". Generated by scripts/build-handoff.mjs — do not edit by hand.
name: New Booking
purpose: Assemble a booking: child, booking type, session, then dates.
exit: Each field opens a picker (S2/S3/S4); Review → S5 when complete
layout: Booking type: Casual / Recurring (tappable) with helper line
Field: Dates → Select dates (appears once a session is chosen)
Pinned bottom CTA 'Review' (disabled until child + session + dates)

copy.text: Child's name / Booking type / Session(s) / Dates

behaviour: Tapping Child's name → S2; Session(s) → S3; Dates → S4.
Booking type toggles Casual ⇄ Recurring (helper text updates).
Dates field appears only after a session is selected; changing the session clears dates.
Review is enabled only when a child, a session, and ≥1 date are set.
a11y: Fields and CTA are buttons with accessible names; ≥44px targets.
Disabled CTA is conveyed by more than colour (it does not advance).

acceptance.text: Review is disabled until child + session + ≥1 date.
Dates field appears only after a session is chosen.
